rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Fam. Code §65.054, which governs petitions for adjudication of truant conduct. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 65.054. STATE'S PETITION. (a) A petition for an adjudication of a child for truant conduct initiates an action of the state against a child who has allegedly engaged in truant conduct.
_note: Rule text concerns juvenile truancy proceedings; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict possible.
